content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be fundamentally improved by integrating the multiple inconsistent perspective design from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or supervision. This new pipeline avoids the common pitfall of single-perspective Self-Refine getting stuck in local optima of output quality by leveraging conflicting feedback from inconsistent solving perspectives.
